calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Resner, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade Association, Inc.; no other appearances.

After hearing, Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED - respond within 15 days of notice; sanctions in the amount of $340- to be paid within 30 days of notice. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
